metadata.description: Collection of Claude Code plugins - agents and skills for development workflows

plugins.description: Essential development agents, rules, and skills for everyday coding workflows
plugins.name: mz-dev-base

plugins.description: Full development pipeline — autonomous coding, reviewing, testing, and research agents with orchestrating skills
plugins.name: mz-dev-pipe

plugins.description: Business outreach and lead generation intelligence — discovers companies, scans reviews, enriches contacts, produces outreach reports
plugins.name: mz-biz-outreach

plugins.description: Multi-perspective AI panels — brainstorming and Delphi-style expert consultation powered by a unified roster of 16 lens agents shared across both modes
plugins.name: mz-creative

plugins.description: Evidence-anchored character-voice code roasting — 7 personas deliver roasts grounded in real findings, never fabricated
plugins.name: mz-funny

plugins.description: Development workflow hooks — safety gates, secret scanning, formatting reminders, and test awareness for any project type
plugins.name: mz-dev-hooks

plugins.description: Cross-session project memory — automatic knowledge persistence, injection, and compaction recovery
plugins.name: mz-memory

plugins.description: UI/UX design document generation — researches the domain, drafts a comprehensive spec, and iterates against ui/ux/art/accessibility critics with a WCAG hard gate
plugins.name: mz-design
